message:
fix(term): reset tiered scrollback state on erase and add scrollback tier test infrastructure

Fixes a bug where erase_scrollback_and_viewport left stale tiering
telemetry and cold spill worker state, causing incorrect warm/cold byte
accounting after scrollback clears. Also adds test infrastructure for
configurable scrollback tiering in the terminal test harness.

screen.rs:
- ColdScrollbackReflowWorker::reset(): new method to clear worker state
- ScrollbackTieringState::reset(): new method to clear tiering counters
- try_advance_tiered_scrollback: early return when hot_scrollback_size
  is zero, avoiding unnecessary tier processing on empty scrollback
- erase_scrollback_and_viewport: now calls reset() on both tiering
  state and cold worker instead of only clearing warm_line_bytes/bytes
- New tests: zero scrollback tier telemetry assertions, and a full
  erase_scrollback_resets_tiered_scrollback_state_and_worker_metrics
  test verifying counters are zeroed after erase

test/mod.rs:
- TestTermConfig: added scrollback_tier field with
  TerminalConfiguration::scrollback_tier_config() delegation
- TestTerm::new_with_scrollback_tier(): new constructor accepting
  explicit ScrollbackTierConfig for tier-aware test scenarios
- TestTerm::new(): refactored to delegate to new_with_scrollback_tier

test/csi.rs:
- test_ed_erase_scrollback_with_tiering_enabled: exercises ED3 (erase
  scrollback) with tiering active
- test_erase_scrollback_and_viewport_with_tiering_enabled: exercises
  the viewport+scrollback clear path with tiering

swarm_simulation_regression.rs:
- Fixed Box::leak memory leak in regression_queue_stats_sum_equals_total
  by moving format!() into a local variable with proper lifetime

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
